name: O.G.R.R. Blue Butterfly
description: The O.G.R.R. Blue Butterfly keeps the base species' graceful aerial movement, but turns it into something far more dangerous. It no longer feels like sky flavor; it feels like an active annoyance that refuses to give you room to breathe.
behavior: Its night spawn only unlocks after releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab. After that it appears at night over the fallen ice cream truck and patrols above the player looking for clean pressure angles.
interactionWithPlayer: It becomes truly dangerous when you cannot knock it down quickly. Left alone, it forces you to fight while watching the sky as the rest of the battle collapses beneath you.
interactionWithCreatures: It works extremely well as aerial support for heavier grounded variants. It does not need to finish you on its own if it has already made you distracted and late for the next hit from the floor.
strategy: If it shares the arena with grounded enemies, knock it down first. It is still most vulnerable when forced to lose altitude or repeat its route, so make that happen before committing to a long exchange.
environments: After releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab

abilities.name: Divebomb Headbutt
abilities.description: It dives from the air and slams head-first into the target.

abilities.name: Combo Bite
abilities.description: A short bite chain used to keep pressure up.

abilities.name: Chilling Gust
abilities.description: Releases a chilling gust that applies cold buildup.
